mapper.select: SELECT id, name, price, category_id AS categoryId, img, description, stock, status, hot FROM good WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO good (name, price, category_id, img, description, stock, status, hot) VALUES (#{name}, #{price}, #{categoryId}, #{img}, #{description}, #{stock}, #{status}, #{hot})
mapper.update: UPDATE good SET name = #{name}, price = #{price}, category_id = #{categoryId}, img = #{img}, description = #{description}, stock = #{stock}, status = #{status}, hot = #{hot} WHERE id = #{id}
